candidates.name: API Request Mirroring Proxy
candidates.pitch: Intercepts fetch/XHR, duplicates requests to a user-configured staging endpoint with optional header rewrites. Built as a service worker proxy layer. Similar to tools like Runscope but browser-native
candidates.pain: No easy way to mirror production API traffic to staging for realistic debugging.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: LinkedIn Company Employee Counter
candidates.pitch: Scrapes employee count from LinkedIn company pages and auto-populates a CRM field or shows a tooltip. Targets salespeople using LinkedIn Sales Navigator. Headcount is a key signal with no clean browse
candidates.pain: Sales teams manually check LinkedIn for headcount data to qualify accounts.

candidates.name: CSP Header Validator
candidates.pitch: Parses Content-Security-Policy headers on any page, highlights violations, and suggests directive fixes. Built via declarativeNetRequest + content script analysis. DevTools already show violations but
candidates.pain: CSP misconfigs silently break functionality and are hard to diagnose manually.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: RegEx Live Validator
candidates.pitch: Runs user-provided regex against all visible page text, highlights matches, and shows capture groups inline. Lightweight—no external dependencies. Existing tools like regex101 require copy-pasting; th
candidates.pain: Regex patterns are tedious to test against real page content without a separate sandbox.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: AI Training Data Detector
candidates.pitch: Maintains a community-curated database of sites known to use user content for model training. Shows a subtle badge on affected pages. Privacy consciousness is rising and no tool surfaces this informat
candidates.pain: Users have no visibility into which sites train AI models on their submitted content.
